name: US500_M5_VolatilityBreakout_NYOpen_v1
hypothesis: On US500 M5, the 30-minute opening range (13:30-14:00 UTC) break during the first hour of US cash open continues with momentum when ATR is elevated.

entry_rules.long: Close > ORHigh + 0.25*ATR(14) AND Close > EMA50 AND breakout within trade_window
entry_rules.short: Close < ORLow - 0.25*ATR(14) AND Close < EMA50 AND breakout within trade_window

exit_rules.sl: 1.0 * ATR(14) or opposite OR edge, whichever closer

notes: Opening-range breakout diversifier; distinct from Asia/London session logic.
